name: sponsorline-cursor
description: Consent-first sponsor line in the Cursor status bar. Reuses the local sponsorline engine — never sees your code.

sponsorline.command.description: Path to the sponsorline CLI binary (the shared on-device engine). Machine-scoped: a workspace cannot override which binary is spawned.

sponsorline.modelName.description: Label shown before the sponsor segment in the status bar.

sponsorline.refreshSeconds.description: How often to re-query the local engine. The CLI's 15-minute rotation cap means most refreshes return the cached line.
